title: IMQ – Increment 8 Education Master Requirements Seed Set (Top-40)
body:
IMQ – Increment 8

Education Master Requirements Seed Set (Top-40)

Issue Type

Enhancement – Master Requirements List (MRL) Seed Data

Objective

Introduce a structured Top-40 Education Master Requirements seed dataset into the existing Master Requirements List (MRL) infrastructure.

This increment is data-only and must:

  • Reuse existing domain entities

  • Introduce no schema changes

  • Introduce no API contract changes

  • Introduce no algorithm changes

  • Maintain read-only posture

This increment enables realistic demo visibility and future participation in Job Requirement Builder and Qualification Assessment.

1. Scope Definition

Impacted Layers

Domain Layer

  • QualificationRequirement (existing entity)

  • No new properties

  • No refactoring

Infrastructure Layer

  • Existing MRL seed provider file
    (Append records to existing seed source file where QualificationRequirement records are initialized)

    Do NOT create a new seed class.

API Layer

  • /api/mrl endpoints (no modifications)

  • No contract changes

Web Layer

  • Master Requirements UI (data rendering only)

  • No new UI controls

  • No editing capability

2. In Scope

  • Append 40 Education-type records to existing MRL seed source

  • Ensure correct rendering in UI

  • Ensure API filtering works for:

    • RequirementType

    • RequirementApprovalStatus

  • Ensure tenant isolation

  • Ensure build integrity

3. Out of Scope (Strict)

Do NOT:

  • Add new database tables

  • Add new properties to QualificationRequirement

  • Modify Qualification Analysis Engine

  • Modify comparison logic

  • Modify weighting logic

  • Modify gap detection

  • Introduce persistence changes

  • Introduce audit trail changes

  • Introduce electronic signature changes

  • Introduce approval workflow

  • Modify DEGREE or MAJOR entities

  • Modify API contract

  • Add new sorting logic

  • Refactor MRL infrastructure

4. Data Model Requirements

Entity Used

QualificationRequirement (existing)

Required Field Mapping

JSON Field | Domain Property -- | -- name | QualificationRequirement.Name requirementType | QualificationRequirement.RequirementType requirementLevel | QualificationRequirement.RequirementLevel requirementApprovalStatus | QualificationRequirement.RequirementApprovalStatus

Enum Values (Use Exact Existing Enum Names)

RequirementType

QualificationRequirementType.Education

RequirementLevel

  • RequirementLevel.Required

  • RequirementLevel.Preferred

RequirementApprovalStatus

  • RequirementApprovalStatus.Draft

  • RequirementApprovalStatus.Approved

  • RequirementApprovalStatus.Obsolete

Do not create new enum values.

5. Seed Data Requirements

Record Count

Exactly 40 records

Status Distribution

  • Majority: Approved

  • 3–4: Draft

  • Exactly 2: Obsolete

Version Behavior

If Version property exists:

  • Default to initial version (e.g., 1)

  • Do not introduce version increment logic

6. Acceptance Criteria

Structure

AC1: All 40 records instantiate successfully as QualificationRequirement
AC2: All records have RequirementType = Education
AC3: No null required fields

Filtering

AC4: Filtering by RequirementType = Education returns exactly 40 records
AC5: Filtering by RequirementApprovalStatus = Approved returns majority of records
AC6: Filtering by Draft returns only Draft records
AC7: Filtering by Obsolete returns exactly 2 records
AC8: Filtering behavior must be deterministic

UI Rendering

AC9: All 40 records render correctly in Master Requirements page
AC10: Draft, Approved, and Obsolete visually render correctly
AC11: No new UI controls introduced

API Integrity

AC12: No API contract change
AC13: /api/mrl response shape unchanged
AC14: No additional API endpoints created

Tenant Isolation

AC15: Seed data loads within current tenant scope only
AC16: No cross-tenant leakage

Build Integrity

AC17: No compilation warnings
AC18: No build errors
AC19: No failing existing tests

Audit / Part 11

AC20: No new audit events generated
AC21: No electronic signature functionality invoked

7. Algorithm Impact Clarification

This increment does NOT modify:

  • Qualification Analysis Engine

  • Requirement comparison logic

  • Gap detection logic

  • Scoring logic

  • Weighting logic

Education requirements participate under existing engine behavior only.

8. Sorting Behavior

No new sorting behavior introduced.

Use existing default ordering logic in MRL rendering.

9. Implementation Notes for Copilot

  • Append records to existing MRL seed provider

  • Reuse existing constructors

  • Do not introduce new interfaces

  • Do not refactor entity

  • Do not modify service layer

  • Do not modify database context

10. Definition of Done

  • 40 Education requirements visible in UI

  • All filters working deterministically

  • No schema changes

  • No engine changes

  • No API changes

  • Clean build

  • Existing regression tests pass

Copilot: Append the following JSON records to the existing MRL seed provider used for QualificationRequirement initialization. Do not create new seed classes. Do not refactor domain entities. Do not modify API or persistence layer.
